description: Glow is an AI-powered introductions and matchmaking service for personal, community, and business use. It helps users find and connect with relevant people through private, consent-aware introductions and messaging.
summary: Glow exposes an OAuth-protected MCP server at `https://agents.talktoglow.com/mcp`; public site copy also mentions REST/API/webhook capabilities and agent API keys, but no separate public API or CLI documentation was found.
